holdings.infoBox: CSRE is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 15.02%, Digital Realty Trust at 9.89%, Crown Castle at 6.70%, Equinix at 6.04%, and Prologis at 4.70%.

overview.description: The Cohen & Steers Real Estate Active ETF (CSRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is actively managed and aims for total return by investing in real estate securities, with a strong focus on income-generating REITs. Utilizing a relative value approach, the fund seeks to identify investment opportunities in the global real estate market for optimal growth CSRE was launched on Feb 4, 2025 and is issued by Cohen & Steers.
